name: PICK DISEASE
definition: FRONTOTEMPORAL DEMENTIA rare form of presenile dementia similar to Alzheimer disease; may be inherited with
dominant_finding: hypometabolism in frontal + anterior temporal lobes + anterior cingulate gyrus
distribution: focal cortical atrophy of anterior frontal + anterior temporal lobes
discriminating_features: focal cortical atrophy of anterior frontal + anterior temporal lobes
dilatation of frontal + temporal horns of lateral ventricle
hypometabolism in frontal + anterior temporal lobes + anterior cingulate gyrus
temporal lobe involvement extends to anterior aspects (NOT in Alzheimer disease)
frontal-predominant form = sparing of temporal lobes

general: focal cortical atrophy of anterior frontal + anterior temporal lobes
dilatation of frontal + temporal horns of lateral ventricle
PET: hypometabolism in frontal + anterior temporal lobes + anterior cingulate gyrus
temporal lobe involvement extends to anterior aspects (NOT in Alzheimer disease)
frontal-predominant form = sparing of temporal lobes
